$comment: team-workflow pod profile — openclaw-style declarative config.
Copy to pod-config.json. entrypoint.sh reads it, interpolates
${ENV_VAR} against the process environment, and exports the
resulting IA_TW_* variables before booting the router.
This file is OPTIONAL. Env vars are the real contract — set the
IA_TW_* vars directly (k8s ConfigMap) and skip this file entirely.
The JSON exists only as a single readable place to see the whole
